# Marked QLAlternatives

Exploring Marked QL alternatives? For elegant note writing, try Bear, while iA Writer offers distraction-free focus and full ownership. Typora blends live preview with seamless export. For preview-first workflows, showmd and Peek supercharge Quick Look with syntax highlighting, scrolling, and easy copy.

results.title: Instant Markdown Preview in Quick Look
results.content:
### Fish

```
function ql --description 'Quick Look a specified file or directory' if [ (count $argv) -gt 0 ] qlmanage >/dev/null 2>/dev/null -p $argv & else echo "No arguments given" end end
```

### Bash / Zsh

```
ql() { if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then qlmanage >/dev/null 2>/dev/null -p "$@" & else echo "No arguments given" fi }
```

Add the function to`~/.bashrc`, `~/.zshrc`, or `~/.config/fish/config.fish`, then restart your shell or run `source` on the file.

Marked QL is a perfect companion toMarked 3 when you want instant Finder previews, while Marked adds live editing preview, proofreading, export, and deep editor integration. Already a Marked user? You will feel right at home.

Quick Look not working? See thetroubleshooting guide. [...] How does Marked QL relate to Marked 3?
:   Marked QL is a lightweight Quick Look companion for instant Finder previews. Marked 3 is a full live-preview app with export, proofreading, custom styles, and editor integration. They work great together, but each app stands on its own.

## Quick Look from Terminal

macOS includes `qlmanage`, a command-line tool that opens Quick Look for any file or folder. Add a short shell function and you can preview Markdown from the command line — if Marked QL is registered as your Markdown viewer, you get the same rendered preview as in Finder.

For example, run `ql README.md` in a project directory to open a Quick Look preview of your readme without leaving Terminal.

### Fish [...] Apex Markdown icon

## Powered by Apex

Marked QL usesApex, a unified Markdown processor that combines CommonMark, GitHub Flavored Markdown, MultiMarkdown, Kramdown, and more. Write in the syntax you already know and get consistent, beautiful output in Quick Look. Apex is also planned for integration into Marked 2 in 2026.

## Frequently asked questions

Do I need Marked to use Marked QL?
:   No. Marked QL works on its own as a Quick Look extension for Markdown files. If you also use Marked 3, Marked QL can share preview styles and offers an Open in Marked button.

results.title: Marked QL: Instant Markdown Preview in Quick Look - MPU Talk
results.content:
So this functionality is not part of Marked 3?

No.

How does Marked QL relate to Marked 3?  
Marked QL is a lightweight Quick Look companion for instant Finder previews. Marked 3 is a full live-preview app with export, proofreading, custom styles, and editor integration. They work great together, but each app stands on its own.

I have for many years used the QLMarkdown extension which has always worked well for me, and is free.

Stephen

I spent 2 hours repeating the dev’s troubleshooting steps but could do nothing to make Marked QL work. Way to much time to waste on this. I deleted it and reinstalled QLMarkdown (as @Stephen\_C mentioned), which works first-time-every-time with no hassles.

Katie

Maybe related to this?

### Marked 3 (@marked@indieapps.space) [...] MPU Talk

# Marked QL: Instant Markdown Preview in Quick Look

New Brett Terpstra (@ttscoff) release for Markdown users:

### Marked QL — Instant Markdown Preview in Quick Look

Preview any Markdown file in Finder with Spacebar. Marked QL uses Apex to render math, diagrams, code, and advanced Markdown syntax.

(One time $4.99 purchase)

It should have been bundled with Marked App. After paying for the Marked App a quick look must have been the feature and not a product.

I thought QL was targeted at people who don’t have/need the full Marked app…

So this functionality is not part of Marked 3?

No. [...] ### Marked 3 (@marked@indieapps.space)

Ok, so I never realized that iA Writer reassigned the UTI of Markdown files. I wasn't prepared for the number of people that have net.ia.markdown as their UTI, for which Marked QL isn't registered. Update coming soon.

Interesting. Yes, on my Mac `mdls` shows that all `.md` documents have `kMDItemContentType` set to `net.ia.markdown`

`mdls`
`.md`
`kMDItemContentType`
`net.ia.markdown`

I’ll give MarkedQL another try, Isn’t it aggravating that iA, a supposedly reputable developer, would arrogantly make a global change like this without warning?

Katie

I’ll give MarkedQL another try

It does work perfectly with my iA Writer files.

Stephen

results.title: 10 Best TextQL Alternatives & Competitors In 2026 · Dot
results.content:
## #1: Dot

Dot is the best alternative to TextQL for analytics teams who want conversational, analyst-grade insights delivered directly where they work, with the flexibility to start on a free plan.

Our platform takes a different approach to AI analytics than most tools in this space.

Rather than translating questions into SQL queries and returning a chart, Dot connects to your data warehouse and performs the full analysis for you.

It explains what's happening, why it's likely happening, and which segments or metrics are driving the change.

It's built for teams where the gap between having data and actually understanding it is the real problem.

### Ad-hoc deep data analysis via Slack or Teams [...] #### TL;DR

 The best alternative to TextQL on the market is Dot, as it goes beyond querying data and actually produces narrative-driven analysis with recommendations, automated business reports, and a trail for every insight.
 If you need self-service BI with spreadsheet-style exploration, tools like Sigma and Metabase are strong options at different price points.
 If you want AI-powered root cause analysis and automated insight discovery, ThoughtSpot, Tellius, and Zenlytic are worth evaluating alongside Dot.
 For budget-conscious teams already in the Zoho ecosystem, Zoho Analytics offers solid AI analytics starting with a free plan.

## Factors To Consider When Evaluating AI Analytics Tools like TextQL [...] The goal is to get insights to the people who need them without creating another bottleneck.

### #4: Pricing transparency and scalability

AI analytics pricing can get complicated fast, with consumption credits, per-user fees, or opaque enterprise quotes.

I looked at how transparent each tool's pricing model is and how costs scale as your team grows.

A platform that looks affordable for 5 users but becomes unmanageable at 50 isn't a real solution.

## What Are the 10 Best TextQL Alternatives & Competitors in 2026?

The best TextQL alternatives in 2026 are Dot, ThoughtSpot, and Tellius.

Here's the full list:

results.title: 38 programming languages. Tried them all! - DEV Community
results.content:
`-- SQL (Structured Query Language) is the go-to language for interacting with relational databases.
-- It allows you to create, read, update and delete data in a simple and intuitive way.
SELECT 'Hello, relational world!' AS greeting; -- Here we SELECT a string value as an alias called "greeting".
/ And now let's have some fun! /
CREATE TABLE cats (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT); -- Create a table named "cats" with columns id, name and age.
INSERT INTO cats (id, name, age) VALUES (1,'Mr. Whiskers', 3); -- Insert Mr. Whiskers into our cats table!
SELECT  FROM cats WHERE age > 2; -- Let's find all the cool adult cats that are older than 2 years old.
